title: Delicate Savory Turkish Potato Kofte
description: A savory Turkish dish featuring charlotte potatoes and render fat, perfect for a romantic evening, this plant-based friendly kofte is sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the grated potatoes, render fat, flour, onion, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper, mixing well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small kofte, about 1 1/2 inches long and 1 inch in diameter.
Place the kofte on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each kofte.
Bake the kofte in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until they are lightly browned and crispy on the outside.
While the kofte are baking, prepare a serving plate with a sprinkle of chopped fresh parsley.
Once the kofte are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes on the baking sheet.
Serve the kofte hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
